title: Poster: Saving Habit
fallbackIncorrect: That's not quite right. Try again!
fallbackTip: Look for the poster that promotes good saving habits.

stages.question: Which poster best promotes good saving habits?
stages.correctFeedback: Save First, Spend Later is the best message for building good financial habits!
stages.explanation: This poster reminds us to save money first before spending on wants!

stages.question: Which poster encourages setting savings goals?
stages.correctFeedback: Save for Your Dreams encourages goal-setting!
stages.explanation: Setting savings goals helps you stay focused and motivated!

stages.question: Which poster shows the importance of a savings account?
stages.correctFeedback: Bank = Safe Money is the right choice!
stages.explanation: Banks keep your money safe and can help it grow with interest!

stages.question: Which poster teaches about emergency savings?
stages.correctFeedback: Save for Rainy Days teaches emergency savings!
stages.explanation: Having emergency savings helps you handle unexpected situations!

stages.question: Which poster promotes regular saving habits?
stages.correctFeedback: Save a Little Every Day promotes good habits!
stages.explanation: Regular saving, even small amounts, builds strong financial habits!
